product_updates.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
product_updates.content: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

product_updates.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
product_updates.content: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

product_updates.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
product_updates.content: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

product_updates.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
product_updates.content: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

product_updates.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
product_updates.content: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

product_updates.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
product_updates.content: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

product_updates.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
product_updates.content: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

product_updates.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
product_updates.content: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them running reliably.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
technical_breakthroughs.content: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.

technical_breakthroughs.title: How virtual power plants could provide energy for data centers
technical_breakthroughs.content: Would you take a payment to ramp down your electricity use? Would it change anything if you were doing so to help power a local data center? Google just signed a new deal to help pay for a virtual power plant (VPP) in the largest power grid in the US. The agreement is with Voltus,…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: Trump’s new AI order, and smart glasses for warfare
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. 5 key points in Trump’s new AI order Less than two weeks after scrapping an executive order on AI, President Donald Trump signed a new one on Tuesday.
